title: Thermos Stainless King Food Flask, 470ml Capacity - Sleek Multi- Purpose Flask for Daily Food Prep - Durable Stainless Steel with Classic Duck Egg Finish - Ideal for On-the-Go Meals & Drinks
features: Thermos Vacuum Insulation: Advanced technology in this thermos food jar keeps your meals hot for 14 hours or cold for 24, ensuring ideal temperature for various activities
Durable Construction: This insulated food container features robust stainless steel interior and exterior that withstand daily use and maintain temperature control
Versatile Lid Design: Insulated lid of this thermos food container doubles as a convenient bowl, reducing the need for extra dishes and making it easy to enjoy your meals anywhere, anytime
Temperature Control: This lunch thermos remains cool to touch with hot contents and sweat-proof with cold, providing safe handling and preventing messy condensation on surfaces
User-Friendly Features: This insulated food jar's wide mouth design allows for easy filling, eating, and cleaning, making it a practical choice for daily meal prep and on-the-go dining
